subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-28
subcodes.first_line: Dear friends, the waves of the bounties of the Blessed Beauty are surging. As I look I see the ocean of His favor swelling
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرات الطاف جمال مبارک موج میزند الآن چون نگاه می کنم می بینم بحر عنایتش مواجست
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude
